verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Seems I have a million things to do, Everything gets placed in front of You; But, Lord, it’s not my desire To see it go that way.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: So I’ll rearrange priorities, Seeking for Your will down on my knees; Giving You the first place, Knowing it’s Your strength I can’t replace.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the center, the center of my life, You’re the reason why I can live more abundantly; Let there be nothing, nothing placed before You, So I can see You in plain view. I want to do everything through Christ, The center, the center of my life.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Whenever I begin my day with prayer, You have never failed to meet me there; And all the other things of life Just seem to work out right.

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: My eyes are fixed on You and You alone, Lord, please come and rule Upon this throne; So that in this life of mine, I can feel Your Presence all the time.

verse.name: v6
verse.lines: You are the center, the center of my life, You’re the reason why I can live more abundantly; Let there be nothing, nothing placed before You, So I can see You in plain view. I want to do everything through Christ, The center, the center of my life.

verse.name: v7
verse.lines: Lord, please be the center, the center of my life.
